questions.text: What is the primary trade-off when selecting a Cross-Encoder over a Bi-Encoder?
options: Cross-encoders have higher accuracy but cannot compute offline index embeddings, leading to high latency.
Bi-encoders require GPU clusters for inference.
questions.correct_answer: Cross-encoders have higher accuracy but cannot compute offline index embeddings, leading to high latency.
questions.explanation: Because Cross-encoders require input pair concatenation during the forward pass, we cannot pre-index document vectors.
